candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate subtotal 'Total Revenue'.

variables.notes: Use 'Revenue' as primary; 'Total Revenue' as fallback for label changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label from income statement; matches values of 'Costs of goods sold'.

candidates.why: Headcount metric, not an income statement expense row.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the correct labels. No explicit SG&A line is present; selected the best overhead component rows from the Income Statement.
